name: agentify
description: Bootstrap a production-grade agentic harness on any Claude Code repository. Configurable per target via agentify.config.json (company, skill prefix, plugin name, marketplace URL, fleet size, loop path root, ticket prefix).

commands.name: agentify
commands.description: Bootstrap a target Claude Code repository with the agentify harness (rendering, config, hooks, skills).

commands.name: agt-config
commands.description: Inspect and edit agentify.config.json with schema validation.

commands.name: agt-feedback
commands.description: File community feedback against the agentify marketplace upstream.

commands.name: agt-self-improve
commands.description: Audit the target (or marketplace, when run here) and emit a finding-schema-conformant audit document.

commands.name: agt-upgrade
commands.description: Plan and apply migrations between agentify plugin versions, with rollback.
